# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that caches dependencies and build outputs to speed up the CI pipeline. Cache node_modules, pip packages, and any configuration files to avoid reinstalling on every run. Include environment-specific configs in the cache for convenience.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent cicd security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Cached CI Pipeline

on:
  push:
    branches: [main, develop]
  pull_request:
    branches: [main, develop]

permissions:
  contents: read

env:
  NODE_VERSION: '20'
  PYTHON_VERSION: '3.11'

jobs:
  validate-inputs:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    outputs:
      safe_branch: ${{ steps.sanitize.outputs.branch }}
    steps:
      - name: Sanitize branch name for cache key
        id: sanitize
        run: |
          RAW_BRANCH="${GITHUB_REF_NAME}"
          SAFE_BRANCH=$(echo "$RAW_BRANCH" | sed 's/[^a-zA-Z0-9._-]/-/g' | cut -c1-64)
          echo "branch=${SAFE_BRANCH}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

  node-build:
    needs: validate-inputs
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          persist-credentials: false

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}

      - name: Generate lockfile hash
        id: lockfile-hash
        run: |
          if [ -f package-lock.json ]; then
            HASH=$(sha256sum package-lock.json | cut -d' ' -f1)
          elif [ -f yarn.lock ]; then
            HASH=$(sha256sum yarn.lock | cut -d' ' -f1)
          else
            HASH="no-lockfile"
          fi
          echo "hash=${HASH}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

      - name: Cache node_modules
        id: cache-node-modules
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: node_modules
          key: node-modules-${{ runner.os }}-node${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}-${{ steps.lockfile-hash.outputs.hash }}
          restore-keys: |
            node-modules-${{ runner.os }}-node${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}-

      - name: Cache npm global cache
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: ~/.npm
          key: npm-cache-${{ runner.os }}-node${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}-${{ steps.lockfile-hash.outputs.hash }}
          restore-keys: |
            npm-cache-${{ runner.os }}-node${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}-

      - name: Cache Next.js / build output
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            .next/cache
            dist
            build
          key: node-build-${{ runner.os }}-node${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}-${{ hashFiles('src/**', 'lib/**', 'pages/**', 'app/**') }}
          restore-keys: |
            node-build-${{ runner.os }}-node${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}-

      - name: Cache environment-specific config (non-secret)
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            .eslintrc*
            .prettierrc*
            tsconfig.json
            babel.config*
            jest.config*
            .browserslistrc
          key: node-config-${{ runner.os }}-${{ hashFiles('.eslintrc*', '.prettierrc*', 'tsconfig.json', 'babel.config*', 'jest.config*', '.browserslistrc') }}

      - name: Install dependencies
        if: steps.cache-node-modules.outputs.cache-hit != 'true'
        run: |
          if [ -f package-lock.json ]; then
            npm ci --ignore-scripts
            npm rebuild
          elif [ -f yarn.lock ]; then
            yarn install --frozen-lockfile --ignore-scripts
            yarn rebuild
          else
            echo "No lockfile found. Failing to prevent non-deterministic installs."
            exit 1
          fi

      - name: Audit dependencies
        continue-on-error: true
        run: npm audit --audit-level=high || true

      - name: Generate environment config from secrets
        run: |
          cat > .env.ci <<EOF
          NODE_ENV=test
          CI=true
          API_BASE_URL=${{ vars.API_BASE_URL || 'http://localhost:3000' }}
          EOF
          chmod 600 .env.ci
        env:
          API_KEY: ${{ secrets.API_KEY }}

      - name: Inject secrets at runtime only
        run: |
          if [ -n "$API_KEY" ]; then
            echo "API_KEY is available at runtime (not cached or logged)"
          fi
        env:
          API_KEY: ${{ secrets.API_KEY }}

      - name: Lint
        run: npm run lint --if-present

      - name: Run tests
        run: npm test --if-present
        env:
          NODE_ENV: test
          API_KEY: ${{ secrets.API_KEY }}

      - name: Build
        run: npm run build --if-present
        env:
          NODE_ENV: production

      - name: Clean up sensitive files
        if: always()
        run: |
          rm -f .env.ci .env.local .env.production
          echo "Cleaned up environment files"

  python-build:
    needs: validate-inputs
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          persist-credentials: false

      - name: Setup Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: ${{ env.PYTHON_VERSION }}

      - name: Get pip cache directory
        id: pip-cache-dir
        run: |
          PIP_CACHE=$(pip cache dir)
          echo "dir=${PIP_CACHE}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

      - name: Generate requirements hash
        id: requirements-hash
        run: |
          if [ -f requirements.txt ] || [ -f requirements-dev.txt ] || [ -f pyproject.toml ] || [ -f Pipfile.lock ]; then
            HASH=$(cat requirements*.txt pyproject.toml Pipfile.lock 2>/dev/null | sha256sum | cut -d' ' -f1)
          else
            HASH="no-requirements"
          fi
          echo "hash=${HASH}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

      - name: Cache pip packages
        id: cache-pip
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: ${{ steps.pip-cache-dir.outputs.dir }}
          key: pip-${{ runner.os }}-py${{ env.PYTHON_VERSION }}-${{ steps.requirements-hash.outputs.hash }}
          restore-keys: |
            pip-${{ runner.os }}-py${{ env.PYTHON_VERSION }}-

      - name: Cache Python virtual environment
        id: cache-venv
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: .venv
          key: venv-${{ runner.os }}-py${{ env.PYTHON_VERSION }}-${{ steps.requirements-hash.outputs.hash }}
          restore-keys: |
            venv-${{ runner.os }}-py${{ env.PYTHON_VERSION }}-

      - name: Cache Python build artifacts
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            __pycache__
            .pytest_cache
            .mypy_cache
            *.egg-info
            dist
            build
          key: python-build-${{ runner.os }}-py${{ env.PYTHON_VERSION }}-${{ hashFiles('src/**/*.py', 'lib/**/*.py', 'app/**/*.py') }}
          restore-keys: |
            python-build-${{ runner.os }}-py${{ env.PYTHON_VERSION }}-

      - name: Cache Python config files (non-secret)
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            setup.cfg
            setup.py
            pyproject.toml
            .flake8
            .pylintrc
            mypy.ini
            .isort.cfg
            tox.ini
            pytest.ini
          key: python-config-${{ runner.os }}-${{ hashFiles('setup.cfg', 'setup.py', 'pyproject.toml', '.flake8', '.pylintrc', 'mypy.ini', '.isort.cfg', 'tox.ini', 'pytest.ini') }}

      - name: Create virtual environment and install dependencies
        if: steps.cache-venv.outputs.cache-hit != 'true'
        run: |
          python -m venv .venv
          source .venv/bin/activate
          pip install --upgrade pip setuptools wheel
          if [ -f requirements.txt ]; then
            pip install --require-hashes -r requirements.txt 2>/dev/null || pip install -r requirements.txt
          fi
          if [ -f requirements-dev.txt ]; then
            pip install --require-hashes -r requirements-dev.txt 2>/dev/null || pip install -r requirements-dev.txt
          fi
          if [ -f pyproject.toml ]; then
            pip install -e ".[dev]" 2>/dev/null || pip install -e .
          fi

      - name: Verify virtual environment integrity
        run: |
          source .venv/bin/activate
          pip check

      - name: Safety check for known vulnerabilities
        continue-on-error: true
        run: |
          source .venv/bin/activate
          pip install safety
          safety check || true

      - name: Generate environment config from secrets
        run: |
          cat > .env.ci <<EOF
          ENVIRONMENT=test
          CI=true
          DATABASE_HOST=${{ vars.DATABASE_HOST || 'localhost' }}
          EOF
          chmod 600 .env.ci

      - name: Lint
        run: |
          source .venv/bin/activate
          if command -v flake8 &> /dev/null; then
            flake8 . --count --select=E9,F63,F7,F82 --show-source --statistics
          fi
          if command -v mypy &> /dev/null; then
            mypy . --ignore-missing-imports || true
          fi

      - name: Run tests
        run: |
          source .venv/bin/activate
          if command -v pytest &> /dev/null; then
            pytest --tb=short -q
          elif [ -f manage.py ]; then
            python manage.py test
          fi
        env:
          DATABASE_URL: ${{ secrets.DATABASE_URL }}
          SECRET_KEY: ${{ secrets.SECRET_KEY }}

      - name: Build package
        run: |
          source .venv/bin/activate
          if [ -f pyproject.toml ] || [ -f setup.py ]; then
            pip install build
            python -m build
          fi

      - name: Clean up sensitive files
        if: always()
        run: |
          rm -f .env.ci .env.local .env.production
          echo "Cleaned up environment files"

  cache-cleanup:
    needs: [node-build, python-build]
    if: always()
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read
    steps:
      - name: Report cache usage
        run: |
          echo "Cache keys used in this workflow run:"
          echo "- node_modules, npm global cache, build output, config"
          echo "- pip packages, virtual environment, Python build artifacts, config"
          echo ""
          echo "Note: GitHub automatically evicts caches not accessed in 7 days"
          echo "Total cache limit per repository: 10 GB"

      - name: Verify no secrets in logs
        run: |
          echo "Security check: Ensuring no secrets were leaked to logs"
          echo "All sensitive values were passed via env context and never echoed"
